summary: High‑quality FOH capture using Oade hardware delivers a vivid listening experience despite unknown show details
review: The reviewer enthusiastically praises this Front‑of‑House recording, noting the renowned Oade equipment and its “speed of an eagle” quality. No specific performance comments are given, but the 5‑star rating indicates strong overall satisfaction with the tape.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights excellent FOH recording quality; lack of show details limits confidence, but overall impression is very positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑House (FOB) capture recorded with Oade hardware praised for clarity and speed; no issues mentioned.
